_meta.model: ONE master index for the whole Manage Scripts tree. Flat scripts[] array (parallels calculations/_index.json). Minimal rows only: name, folder, calls, scriptRef. The renderer builds the folder tree from each row's `folder` and the CALLS/CALLED-BY graph from `calls[]`; `calledBy` is DERIVED at render time by inverting every row's calls[] and is NEVER stored. Listing is not loading: the tree + graph read only this file; a body is fetched lazily, one at a time, on drill-in.
_meta.bodyNature: DICTATION reference (the exact steps to type into Manage Scripts, narrative as native # comment lines) — NOT paste-round-trippable, because FileMaker's script clipboard is XML, not plain text. Unlike .fmcalc.
_meta.keying: Script names are unique per FileMaker file, so `name` is a safe graph key (calc fields needed <Table>__<Field> because they are not unique; scripts are).
_meta.callsResolution: calls[] may target a script OR a custom function; the linter resolves each against this file first, then functions/_index.json.
_meta.capDiscipline: Keep rows minimal so this master index stays under the ~30KB read cap (~90 bytes/row). If a solution ever crosses it, shard by top-level folder behind a pointer — still no renderer change.
_meta.status: Skeleton. Only commitRecord is populated (shared standard helper). Real HML script inventory pending a live-file DDR enumeration pass.
